svg.style: display: inline-block; position: absolute; top: 0px; left: 0px;
svg.title: Sheet Music for "The Blackbird (Set Dance)"

text.tspan: Source: Bobby Gardiner, Memories of Claire (1996) with my own variations.
Notes: Really interesting tune I stumbled upon. Unusually (as far as I know), each part ends with an
extra two beats. Has a strong melodic sympathy with the Blackbird Hornpipe, though I think
it sounds better when slowed down (as Bobby Gardiner plays it). Repeats are intentional.
